Uses of Class
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.shape.TextBlockMemoized

Packages that use TextBlockMemoized
Package
Description
net.sourceforge.plantuml
Contains classes for processing PlantUML source files.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.activitydiagram3.gtile
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.bpm
Provides classes used to manage BPMN (Business Process Model and Notation) Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.crash
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML or Graphviz Crash.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.cucadiagram
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML Class-UseCase-Activity (CUCA) Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.descdiagram
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML Description Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.ebnf
Provides classes used to manage EBNF (Extended Backus–Naur Form) Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.filesdiagram
Provides classes used to manage [Tree] Files diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.gantt
Provides classes used to manage Gantt Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.golem
Provides classes used to manage Tile of especially Flow Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.jsondiagram
Provides classes used to manage JSON Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.compress
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.creole
Provides classes used to manage Creole (markup language).
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.creole.atom
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.creole.legacy
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.shape
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.mindmap
Provides classes used to manage Mindmap Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.nwdiag.next
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.packetdiag
Provides classes used to manage Packet Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.sequencediagram.teoz
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.svek
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML Svek Architecture.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.svek.image
